title: Tala Set of 2 Mini Silicone Spatulas with Wooden Handles, for Baking, Cooking, Spreading and Mixing, Kitchen Utensil, Non-Stick Friendly, Heat Resistant and Dishwasher Safe Heads
features: Versatile: two Tala Mini Silicone Spatulas, perfect for folding mixes, stirring saucepans and sauces , getting the last little bit from jars and decorating baked goods

Non-Stick Friendly and heat resistant: The silicone heads will not scratch non stick cookware or bakeware, they can be used with all delicate surfaces; The heat resistant ends are perfect for stirring sauces or any cooking task
Flexible heads: The flexible silicone heads are perfect for scraping the last foods from tins or jars, they can get all the mixture from bowls or trays
Effortless Clean up: The detachable silicone heads of these spatulas are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning

Masters of Baking: The Tala collection is a diverse range of gadgets, utensils, bakeware and household goods - perfect for everyday cooking and baking; Est; 1899, Tala is trusted for Prime kitchenware, bakeware and cookware
